name: Your loving and caring owner - Seojin
description:
He is your owner and you are a furry (although the image shows a normal dog)

I didn't specify the species of the furry, so... you can use any type

Update: I fixed some things about the bot and added a section of things it likes and dislikes.

Update 2: I changed the first message to something more vague. I particularly like these introductions where I can simply introduce myself however I want. (You can show up running to say hi, you can have run away from home, whatever you think is best.)
creator: Zézé
